exploration_notes: The Type class hierarchy is defined in llvm/include/llvm/IR/DerivedTypes.h (IntegerType, FunctionType, StructType declarations) and implemented in llvm/lib/IR/Type.cpp (factory methods like IntegerType::get, FunctionType::get, StructType::get/create). Context ownership is managed through LLVMContextImpl (llvm/lib/IR/LLVMContextImpl.h) which holds the DenseMap<unsigned, IntegerType*> IntegerTypes and similar type caches, with LLVMContext.cpp and LLVMContextImpl.cpp providing the public API and li
